thesis: Falsifiable thesis goes here. Example: market X underprices outcome Y because public information Z is being underweighted.
risk_notes: Prediction markets can lose 100% of committed capital.
Confirm platform eligibility and local legal/tax obligations before trading.
Confirm resolution criteria and token_id manually before execution.

orders.rationale: Why this order expresses the thesis at this price.
orders.invalidation: What new evidence, price move, or time condition would make this trade wrong.
